name: Pasta with Chicken and Broccoli Pesto
method: Cook pasta as per the directions on the package. In a saucepan, boil the broccoli for about 3 minutes and drain.
In a skillet, gently cook the chicken, pepper, pine nuts and garlic for 2-3 minutes, stirring.
Add broccoli and stir for about 2 minutes. Add pasta and toss. Add the Parmesan cheese and toss to combine.
(32) Orzo with Braised Short Ribs in Burgundy Sauce
Braised short ribs are one of those dishes that taste amazing and require little to no effort. The key ingredient in
braising the meat is a flavorful liquid (typically red wine) and lots of time to tenderize the beef. The short rib is one
of the most beautiful cuts of beef: elegant, tender, and succulent. Braised in a thick, rich sauce with plenty of red
wine and bright flavors like garlic and fresh herbs, it becomes an almost magical dish.
